title: SASTYBALE Jacquard Checked Table Cloth, Spillproof Wrinkle-Resistant Gingham Tablecloth, Checkered Fabric Table Cover for Dining/Parties/Outdoor(Rectangle,132 X 178cm (4-6 Seats),Grey)
features: Premium Material: Our checked table cloth is crafted from high-quality, durable polyester. This durable fabric ensures your table and furniture are well-protected. The ultra-soft tablecloth is smooth, scratch-resistant, and wrinkle-resistant.

Retro Design: Featuring a delicate jacquard design with a plaid pattern, this tablecloth is elegant and luxurious. It not only enhances the dining atmosphere but also elevates the overall style of your room.

Spill Proof: Made from premium polyester fabric with a spill-proof treatment, any liquid can be easily wiped away. The fabric is sturdy and resistant to fading, ensuring it won't fray even after long-term use.

Versatile Occasions: Our elegant table cloth is perfect for a variety of settings, including dining room tables, kitchen tables, cafes, restaurants, diners, catering events, weddings, brunches, buffets, parties, picnics, outdoor patio tables, and more.

Washable & Easy Care: This table cloth is easy to clean and care. Machine wash in cold water and tumble dry. Hand washing or laying flat to dry is better. No ironing(Light ironing if necessary). Do not bleach.
description: Product Description High Quality Polyester Spill-proof & Wrinkle-resistant Checked Tablecloth About Us SASTYBALE offers high-quality tablecloths in a variety of colors and designs. We are dedicated to creating unique styles for our products. Inspired by the feeling of a natural home, our patterned table cloths feature elegant designs which will create a relaxing setting for your table and a warm and sweet atmosphere when you gather around to share a meal with family. Water Resistant This tablecloth is made of premium polyester fabric with spill-proof & oil-proof treatment. All liquids bead up for easy cleaning. Wrinkle Resistant This table cloth is made of high quality, super soft, luxurious polyester fabric which resists wrinkling, it won't wrinkle like inferior-grade fabrics. Exquisite Workmanship This table cloth is made by skilled artisans featuring fine sewing and sturdy hemmed edge. No loose threads. Machine Washable Machine wash in cold water and tumble dry, hand wash is better; Dryer drying or lay flat to dry; No ironing(or lightly ironing if necessary). Do Not Bleach. Heavy Weight Premium tablecloth has the perfect weight, it is thick and non-slip, making them an ideal protective cover for your tables and furniture. Versatile Occasions Our delicate Jacquard Style tablecloths is designed for a variety of occasions such as dining-room, kitchen, Cafes, restaurants, diners, catering, weddings, brunches, buffets, parties, picnics, outdoor patio table and more. Notice: Please allow 1-2 cm error due to manual measurement Due to the display and personal feeling, the page image may differ from the actual product color. There may be slight color differences between different batches. TABLE SIZE≠TABLECLOTH SIZE Tablecloth Length=Table Length + 2x Drop Tablecloth Width= Table Width +2 x Drop HOW TO CHOOSE A FITTED TABLECLOTH? 1.Select the Overhang: Decide on the desired overhang length for your tablecloth. For dining tables, consider 20-30cm, and for coffee tables, 15-20cm. 2.Measure the Table: Using a tape measure, precisely record the length and width of your table's surface in centimeters. 3.Calculate Total Dimensions: Double your chosen overhang and add it to both the length and width of your table to determine the total dimensions of the tablecloth you need. 4.Verify Measurements: Before purchasing, double-check all measurements to ensure they are accurate, guaranteeing a perfect fit for your table.
